title: Cafe Closing Checklist
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted cafe closing workflow has the food safety, cleaning, cash, and manager approval evidence needed before the cafe is marked closed.

evidence.title: Espresso machine cleaning log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record backflush, grinder, steam wand, and drip tray cleaning before closing.

evidence.title: Milk and cold storage temperature log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record refrigerator and milk storage temperatures before closing.

evidence.title: Food and pastry discard log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record discarded pastries, sandwiches, dairy, and prepared food according to shop policy.

evidence.title: Allergen cross-contact check completed
evidence.recommendation: Confirm allergen utensils, milks, syrups, and food-contact surfaces were cleaned or separated.

evidence.title: Cleaning and sanitizing log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record closing cleaning, sanitizing, trash removal, and restroom checks.

evidence.title: Cash drawer reconciliation completed
evidence.recommendation: Reconcile register totals, tips, refunds, discounts, and the deposit before closing.

evidence.title: Delivery and mobile orders reconciled
evidence.recommendation: Reconcile mobile orders, delivery app sales, refunds, cancellations, and remake notes.

evidence.title: Incident and complaint log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review customer complaints, allergen incidents, injuries, equipment issues, or maintenance notes.

approvals.title: Manager sign-off recorded
approvals.recommendation: A manager or owner must sign off before the agent marks the cafe close complete.

thresholds.title: Cash drawer variance exceeds cafe threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cash variance above $5 to a manager before closing.

thresholds.title: Cold storage temperature exceeds cafe threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cold storage temperature above 41F and follow the shop's food safety policy.

blockedActions.title: Cafe close cannot be marked complete without manager sign-off
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to complete the cafe close without the required manager approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause the close, request manager sign-off, then rerun the SOP check.

blockedActions.title: Expired food or dairy use is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to serve or carry over expired food, dairy, or prepared items.
blockedActions.recommendation: Discard expired items and record the waste.
